base_query: (("without evidence" OR "no evidence" OR "no data" OR "on a hunch" OR "gut feeling" OR intuitively)) AND ((pilot OR "pilot scheme" OR "pilot programme" OR "pilot program" OR "rolled out" OR "roll out")) AND ((policy OR programme OR program OR scheme OR service OR measure OR regulation OR initiative OR intervention OR council OR government OR NHS OR city OR "public health" OR education OR transport OR policing)) AND ((government OR minister OR department OR council OR mayor OR NHS OR regulator OR agency OR authority)) AND NOT ((sentencing OR prosecution OR defendant OR appeal OR court OR tribunal OR judge OR match OR tournament OR goal OR coach OR album OR film OR theatre OR premiere OR trial OR randomized OR randomised OR study OR evaluation OR pilot OR "impact assessment" OR review))
